Name: FAnimationRecordingSettings
Description: Settings describing how to record an animation

Variables.Name: bRecordInWorldSpace
Variables.Description: Whether to record animation in world space, defaults to true

Variables.Name: bRemoveRootAnimation
Variables.Description: Whether to remove the root bone transform from the animation

Variables.Name: bAutoSaveAsset
Variables.Description: Whether to auto-save asset when recording is completed. Defaults to false

Variables.Name: SampleRate
Variables.Description: Sample rate of the recorded animation (in Hz)

Variables.Name: Length
Variables.Description: Maximum length of the animation recorded (in seconds). If zero the animation will keep on recording until stopped.

Variables.Name: InterpMode
Variables.Description: Interpolation mode for the recorded keys.

Variables.Name: TangentMode
Variables.Description: Tangent mode for the recorded keys.
